steps.name: OutlineGateEvaluator domain logic
steps.description: Pure domain evaluator. Blocks writes to wave-4-drafting/ when proposal-outline.md absent from outline_artifacts_present. No skip marker. No prerequisite creation exception.
criteria: Write to wave-4-drafting/ blocked when proposal-outline.md not in outline_artifacts_present
Edit to wave-4-drafting/ blocked same as Write when outline absent
Writes outside wave-4-drafting/ not affected by this gate
Block message includes guidance to complete outline in Wave 3
Block message includes path reference to wave-3-outline/

steps.name: Hook adapter cross-directory resolution
steps.description: Extend resolve_tool_context() to derive wave-3-outline/ from wave-4-drafting/ target path. Check proposal-outline.md at sibling path. Pass outline_artifacts_present in tool_context.
criteria: Multi-proposal path (artifacts/{topic-id}/wave-4-drafting/) resolves to sibling wave-3-outline/
Legacy path (artifacts/wave-4-drafting/) resolves to sibling wave-3-outline/
outline_artifacts_present contains proposal-outline.md when file exists
outline_artifacts_present is empty list when file absent
Paths outside wave-4-drafting/ produce empty outline_artifacts_present

steps.name: Engine registration and config rule
steps.description: Register OutlineGateEvaluator in engine._evaluators as 'outline_gate'. Add rule 'drafting-requires-outline' to pes-config.json.
criteria: Engine _evaluators contains 'outline_gate' mapped to OutlineGateEvaluator
pes-config.json contains rule with rule_id 'drafting-requires-outline' and rule_type 'outline_gate'
Engine dispatches outline_gate rules to correct evaluator
Rule count in pes-config.json is 12

steps.name: Integration tests: end-to-end outline gate enforcement
steps.description: Integration tests loading real pes-config.json through engine. Verify gate blocks and allows correctly through full hook-to-evaluator path.
criteria: Draft write blocked end-to-end when outline absent (config -> engine -> evaluator -> BLOCK)
Draft write allowed end-to-end when proposal-outline.md exists in wave-3-outline/
Gate does not interfere with writes outside wave-4-drafting/
Cross-directory resolution works for both multi-proposal and legacy layouts

steps.name: BDD acceptance tests from user story scenarios
steps.description: Acceptance tests implementing all 9 Gherkin scenarios from US-OGATE-01 and US-OGATE-02. Validates blocking, allowing, path resolution, non-interference, and audit trail.
criteria: All 9 scenarios from user stories pass
Audit log entries verified for block and allow decisions
Multi-proposal and legacy path layouts covered
